name: faudit
description: Live-stream a file audit for a directory, optionally limited by max depth, with extension-based icons and color-coded output. See #assets/payloads/FILEOPS/faudit.

prompts: Enter max depth (Press Enter for Infinity)

outputs: Lists files discovered under the target directory

behavior.help_mode: Shows usage and a short explanation when no directory or -h is provided
behavior.depth_control: Applies -maxdepth only when the user supplies a value

notes: Output depends on terminal support for emoji and ANSI colors
